title: TeaCup
description: Utility and Event base library for serverside mods
body:
# 🍵 Tea Cup 🍵 ``` Utility and Event base library for serverside mods ```

### Description This is library created to give mods utilities that they can use and also adds events system for serverside mods, so they can create mixin-free and mojank-free mods, potentially making it easier to port their mods on different versions without needing to touch weird mojank stuff. It will be updated on snapshots/latest possible versions. ### Feature requests Any feature requests should be done on [issues](https://github.com/JustFoxx/Tea-Cup/issues) page. ### Non-minecraft features This library after some tweaks can be also used in non-minecraft environment. It gives very useful tools like registry or event handler, also having features that java lacks (tuples). ### Documentation Documentation can be found [here](https://github.com/JustFoxx/Tea-Cup#readme)
